subcodes.first_line: O enkindled flame of divine love! Like unto the sage in the sanctuary of God's affection, wholly dedicate thy life, thy possessions, thy kindred and thy worldly wealth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شمع افروخته عشق الهی چون پیر صومعه محبت الله جان و مال و اهل و منال را کلا
subcodes.subjects: @fellowship with the wayward and ungodly, @martyrs and martyrdom, @soul; spirit after death
